economic_notes: COVID-19 pandemic had significant impact on operations. Nation operates a Convenience Store and VLT Gaming Operations. TTR Legacy Trust provides annual income distributions. 1905 Railway Expropriation Specific Claim settlement proceeds administered in trust.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024 as stated in document. Nation consolidates 8 entities including health authority, housing authority, ISETS program, childcare, holdings company, convenience store and VLT operations. Total government transfers per Note 14 = $16,358,569 which exceeds total revenue of $15,981,350 due to deferred revenue adjustments on the income statement. OSR is negative because government transfers exceed reported revenue after deferred revenue adjustments. Term loans due on demand of $2,003,345 are classified separately from long-term debt of $5,243,384; long_term_debt field reflects the formal long-term debt only. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt only ($455,646) per cash flow statement; additional demand loan repayments of $178,197 also occurred. No schedule of remuneration provided. Band Operations segment expenses of $6,350,176 per Schedule 3 used for administration. COVID-19 noted as significant event.
